Caption: Setup for liquid-phase sono-photodegradation of drugs.

Ag-TiO2 synthesised by classical impregnation without (left) or with (right) ultrasound during impregnation.
HR-TEM images of Cu-TiO2 synthetized by US assisted impregnation method.
